productDisplayName: Citizen Men Sliver Dial Chronograph Watch
description: Case style: Stainless steel round case Dial style: Silver dial with silver hands Strap style: Steel strap with a butterfly clasp Features: 3-faced chronograph display Branding and date aperture on the 3 hour mark and a screw to reset time Solid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durability Water resistance up to 100 metres, wearable around sinks, during swimming, poolside diving but not highboard diving and surfing Warranty: One year international warranty
